meta.title: Sister Dew
meta.subtitle: Let your tender wisdom be mine.
meta.author: Hitoshi

pages.title: About Me
pages.text: 以前朋友们都叫我小强。 Aquarius. Single dorky male killing time in South California. PhD candidate of political philosophy. Taking the labor of love of studying a renaissance devil. A reliable driver, a fabulous cook, a delightful friend, a man safe with his secrets. Email: deus.dew@gmail.com

posts.title: 插件测试
posts.text: 下图来自Flickr: 下面视频来自Instagram顺便推荐这个号，专发精美便当，精美到让人舍不得吃那种，晚上饿了看一看能管饱。 update: 无法使用autolinker 带# 的都会转到Instagram去，比如 #overwatch.不过这个功能以后要关掉，因为Markdown需要很多# 来标注不同层次的标题。（话说这个主题也会换成之前那个自动由标题生成提纲、又能逐段做评论的模板，可是那个模板似乎不能显示炫酷的Instagram~而且作者也早已把它标为“弃用”了。） update: 无法使用autolinker带@ 去twitter, 比如 @RealDonalDrumpf [1]（这里顺便测试一个footnote） 另外自动补全网址超链真是太方便了，下面这个网址前后没做任何标记就变成超链了 https://github.com/fbrctr/fabricator/issues/241 最后，插入B站视频的框架不居中，看着难受。不过由于是Flash不是HTML5,反正手机上也看不到。在电脑上打开会看到王老板配乐版的“一个小目标”。 加测PDF and twitter 测试Spotify 测试标签插件 Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Pellentesque hendrerit lacus ut purus iaculis feugiat. Sed nec tempor elit, quis aliquam neque. Curabitur sed diam eget dolor fermentum semper at eu lorem. Do not just seek happiness for yourself. Seek happiness for all. Through kindness. Through mercy. David LevithanWide Awake 1.@iamjohnoliver 说这才是他的真名：https://youtu.be/DnpO_RTSNmQ?t=18m ↩

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
